config.score_semantics: Integer number of mutual-RootSIFT correspondences verified as inliers by the existing PPI-normalized partial-affine RANSAC. compare() performs no acceptance thresholding.

external_runtime.python_version: 3.11.15 | packaged by conda-forge | (main, Jun 11 2026, 03:27:10) [MSC v.1944 64 bit (AMD64)]
external_runtime.runtime_network_policy: no runtime downloads or model weights

descriptor.non_finite_policy: drop complete descriptor rows before RootSIFT

adapter_declared_provenance.detector_only_ablation: HarrisZ+ replaces DoG/SIFT keypoint detection; descriptor, matcher, geometry, and raw-score semantics reuse the existing SIFT implementation
adapter_declared_provenance.engine: clean-room HarrisZ+ CPU/CUDA detector with OpenCV supplied-keypoint SIFT

image_policy.doubling: one exact 2x cv2.resize call with INTER_LANCZOS4
image_policy.oracle_divergence: OpenCV INTER_LANCZOS4 is the frozen adapter choice; the official Matlab oracle uses Lanczos-3 support

keypoint_adapter.opencv_octave: 0 for every native-coordinate supplied keypoint; HarrisZ scale must not alter OpenCV descriptor support

orientation.ambiguity_180_degrees: full signed gradient; no random flip
orientation.peak_interpolation: three-sample parabola clipped to half a bin

official_reference_oracle.role: reference oracle only for response/keypoint comparison and underspecified conventions; it is not a runtime dependency

ppi_aware_spatial_contract.local_maximum_policy: strict 7x7 topology is an unchanged algorithmic neighborhood, not an independently tuned physical radius
ppi_aware_spatial_contract.subpixel_policy: unchanged dimensionless parabolic offset in the local pixel cell; no clipping distance is present
ppi_aware_spatial_contract.tolerance_policy: abs(mm_B - mm_C) <= max(0.001 mm, 1% of reference value)
ppi_aware_spatial_contract.uniform_q_policy: uniform q is dimension-derived and not independently PPI-scaled

primary_paper.title: HarrisZ+: Harris Corner Selection for Next-Gen Image Matching Pipelines

adapter_declared_provenance.statement: This repository implementation was written independently from the equations and prose in Sections 3.1 and 3.2 of the HarrisZ+ paper. The authors' GPL-3.0 repository was used only as a source-level reference oracle for validation and underspecified conventions. No function, code fragment, or translated implementation from that repository was copied.

timing_policy.cuda_peak_measurement: synchronize, empty_cache, synchronize, reset peaks, then report allocated and reserved separately

v4_isolation.only_algorithmic_change: all audited spatial HarrisZ+ parameters are interpreted at manifest_ppi / 1000 reference scale

implementation_hash_components.score_semantics: Integer number of mutual-RootSIFT correspondences verified as inliers by the existing PPI-normalized partial-affine RANSAC. compare() performs no acceptance thresholding.

descriptor.non_finite_policy: drop complete descriptor rows before RootSIFT

implementation_provenance.detector_only_ablation: HarrisZ+ replaces DoG/SIFT keypoint detection; descriptor, matcher, geometry, and raw-score semantics reuse the existing SIFT implementation
implementation_provenance.engine: clean-room HarrisZ+ CPU/CUDA detector with OpenCV supplied-keypoint SIFT

image_policy.doubling: one exact 2x cv2.resize call with INTER_LANCZOS4
image_policy.oracle_divergence: OpenCV INTER_LANCZOS4 is the frozen adapter choice; the official Matlab oracle uses Lanczos-3 support

keypoint_adapter.opencv_octave: 0 for every native-coordinate supplied keypoint; HarrisZ scale must not alter OpenCV descriptor support

orientation.ambiguity_180_degrees: full signed gradient; no random flip
orientation.peak_interpolation: three-sample parabola clipped to half a bin

official_reference_oracle.role: reference oracle only for response/keypoint comparison and underspecified conventions; it is not a runtime dependency

ppi_aware_spatial_contract.local_maximum_policy: strict 7x7 topology is an unchanged algorithmic neighborhood, not an independently tuned physical radius
ppi_aware_spatial_contract.subpixel_policy: unchanged dimensionless parabolic offset in the local pixel cell; no clipping distance is present
ppi_aware_spatial_contract.tolerance_policy: abs(mm_B - mm_C) <= max(0.001 mm, 1% of reference value)
ppi_aware_spatial_contract.uniform_q_policy: uniform q is dimension-derived and not independently PPI-scaled

primary_paper.title: HarrisZ+: Harris Corner Selection for Next-Gen Image Matching Pipelines

implementation_provenance.statement: This repository implementation was written independently from the equations and prose in Sections 3.1 and 3.2 of the HarrisZ+ paper. The authors' GPL-3.0 repository was used only as a source-level reference oracle for validation and underspecified conventions. No function, code fragment, or translated implementation from that repository was copied.

score_semantics: Integer number of mutual-RootSIFT correspondences verified as inliers by the existing PPI-normalized partial-affine RANSAC. compare() performs no acceptance thresholding.
